content:
💡 episteme | Kotlin
🎯 Primary Use Case: A versatile, privacy-conscious offline document and e-book reader for Android devices.
✨ Key Features: • Supports PDF, EPUB, MOBI, AZW3, Markdown, HTML, and plain text. • Ink and text annotations for PDFs. • Native parsing for MOBI/AZW3 and EPUB. • Customizable e-book reading (font size, line spacing, margins, custom fonts). • Text-to-Speech (TTS) functionality.
📖 Summary: Episteme Reader is a native Android application for reading various document and e-book formats offline. It focuses on privacy and offers features like annotations, text-to-speech, and customizable reading experiences.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
